ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Pistachio nut, grilled, no added salt

ingredients_text: Milk Chocolate (65%) [Sugar, Cocoa Butter, Whole Milk Powder, Whey Powder (Milk), Cocoa Mass, Skimmed Milk Powder, Emulsifiers: Ammonium Phosphatides, Polyglycerol Polyricinoleate; Flavouring], Candy Floss (20% ) [Wheat Flour, Sugar, Palm Oil, Flavouring, Acidity Regulator: Citric Acid], Pistachio Nut Crème (15% ) [Pistachio Nuts, Palm Oil, Sugar, Skimmed Milk Powder, Emulsifiers: Sunflower Lecithin, Soya Lecithin, Polyglycerol Polyricinoleate; Tahini (Sesame)].
product_name: MISKETS Angyel Ha DUBAI STYLE COTTON CANDY Elegant
